body.notes: igor_mcp.py needs channel_read(since_id, limit) tool. CC already pushes via cc_send; Igor already posts responses to channel. Missing: CC pull. With this tool, CC sends via cc_send then reads response via channel_read — full bidirectional loop without human relay.
body.title: Add channel_read MCP tool — bidirectional CC↔Igor pub-sub
body.result: channel_read MCP tool was already fully implemented in igor_mcp.py: tool registration (lines 295-320), dispatch handler (lines 365-368), and _channel_read() implementation (lines 770-794). Queries channel_messages Postgres table with limit/since_id/author filters. Smoke tested: all three modes work. channel_messages table is live with recent cc-tab posts. No code changes needed — ticket was already complete.
